drills.title: Complete Mock Test + Final Revision — Speaking Set 1

sentences.english: I can now speak English fluently.
sentences.hindi: मैं अब अंग्रेज़ी में धाराप्रवाह बोल सकता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i can now speak english fluently

sentences.english: I have completed this challenge.
sentences.hindi: मैंने यह चुनौती पूरी कर ली है।
sentences.pronunciation: i have completed this challenge

sentences.english: Seventy-five days ago I could not speak English.
sentences.hindi: पचहत्तर दिन पहले मैं अंग्रेज़ी नहीं बोल पाता था।
sentences.pronunciation: seventy-five days ago i could not speak english

drills.title: Complete Mock Test + Final Revision — Speaking Set 2

sentences.english: Now I don't hesitate to talk on any topic.
sentences.hindi: अब मुझे किसी भी विषय पर बात करने में झिझक नहीं होती।
sentences.pronunciation: now i don't hesitate to talk on any topic

sentences.english: I speak confidently in the office.
sentences.hindi: मैं ऑफिस में आत्मविश्वास से बात करता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i speak confidently in the office

sentences.english: I can perform well in an interview.
sentences.hindi: मैं इंटरव्यू में अच्छा प्रदर्शन कर सकता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i can perform well in an interview

drills.title: Complete Mock Test + Final Revision — Speaking Set 3

sentences.english: I now have a good understanding of grammar.
sentences.hindi: मुझे अब व्याकरण की अच्छी समझ है।
sentences.pronunciation: i now have a good understanding of grammar

sentences.english: My vocabulary has increased a lot.
sentences.hindi: मेरी शब्दावली बहुत बढ़ गई है।
sentences.pronunciation: my vocabulary has increased a lot

sentences.english: I can easily write emails and letters.
sentences.hindi: मैं ईमेल और पत्र आसानी से लिख सकता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i can easily write emails and letters

drills.title: Complete Mock Test + Final Revision — Speaking Set 4

sentences.english: I can easily do daily conversations.
sentences.hindi: मैं रोज़ की बातचीत आराम से कर लेता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i can easily do daily conversations

sentences.english: This is my biggest achievement.
sentences.hindi: यह मेरी सबसे बड़ी उपलब्धि है।
sentences.pronunciation: this is my biggest achievement

sentences.english: I now speak English without hesitation.
sentences.hindi: मैं अब बिना झिझक के अंग्रेज़ी बोलता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i now speak english without hesitation

drills.title: Complete Mock Test + Final Revision — Speaking Set 5

sentences.english: This course has proved very useful in my life.
sentences.hindi: यह कोर्स मेरे जीवन में बहुत उपयोगी साबित हुआ।
sentences.pronunciation: this course has proved very useful in my life

sentences.english: I worked hard every single day.
sentences.hindi: मैंने हर दिन कड़ी मेहनत की।
sentences.pronunciation: i worked hard every single day

sentences.english: Now I am ready for new opportunities.
sentences.hindi: अब मैं नए अवसरों के लिए तैयार हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: now i am ready for new opportunities

drills.title: Complete Mock Test + Final Revision — Speaking Set 6

sentences.english: I am proud of my progress.
sentences.hindi: मुझे अपनी प्रगति पर गर्व है।
sentences.pronunciation: i am proud of my progress

sentences.english: This is my final test.
sentences.hindi: यह मेरी अंतिम परीक्षा है।
sentences.pronunciation: this is my final test

sentences.english: I will take this test with confidence.
sentences.hindi: मैं आत्मविश्वास से यह परीक्षा दूँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will take this test with confidence

drills.title: Complete Mock Test + Final Revision — Speaking Set 7

sentences.english: My English is now at a professional level.
sentences.hindi: मेरी अंग्रेज़ी अब पेशेवर स्तर की है।
sentences.pronunciation: my english is now at a professional level

sentences.english: I want to keep learning forever.
sentences.hindi: मैं हमेशा सीखते रहना चाहता हूँ।
sentences.pronunciation: i want to keep learning forever
